2604.26522.title: AGEL-Comp: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Compositional Generalization in Interactive Agents
2604.26522.paper_summary: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents exhibit systemic failures in compositional generalization, limiting their robustness in interactive environments. This work introduces AGEL-Comp, a neuro-symbolic AI agent architecture designed to address this challenge by grounding actions of the agent. AGEL-Comp integrates three core innovations: (1) a dynamic Causal Program Graph (CPG) as a world model, representing procedural and causal knowledge as a directed hypergraph; (2) an Inductive Logic Programming (ILP) engine that synthesizes new Horn clauses from experiential feedback, grounding symbolic knowledge through interaction; and (3) a hybrid reasoning core where an LLM proposes a set of candidate sub-goals that are verified for logical consistency by a Neural Theorem Prover (NTP). Together, these components operationalize a deduction--abduction learning cycle: enabling the agent to deduce plans and abductively expand its symbolic world model, while a neural adaptation phase keeps its reasoning engine aligned with new knowledge. We propose an evaluation protocol within the \texttt{Retro Quest} simulation environment to probe for compositional generalization scenarios to evaluate our AGEL agent. Our findings clearly indicate the better performance of our AGEL model over pure LLM-based models. Our framework presents a principled path toward agents that build an explicit, interpretable, and compositionally structured understanding of their world.
2604.26522.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）基礎的代理在組合泛化方面表現出系統性失敗，限制了它們在互動環境中的穩健性。這項工作介紹了 AGEL-Comp，一種神經符號 AI 代理架構，旨在通過將代理的行動具體化來應對這一挑戰。AGEL-Comp 整合了三項核心創新：（1）一個動態因果程序圖（CPG）作為世界模型，將程序性和因果知識表示為有向超圖；（2）一個歸納邏輯編程（ILP）引擎，從經驗反饋中合成新的霍恩子句，通過互動將符號知識具體化；以及（3）一個混合推理核心，其中 LLM 提出一組候選子目標，這些目標由神經定理證明器（NTP）驗證邏輯一致性。這些組件共同實現了一個推理--歸納學習循環：使代理能夠推導計劃並歸納性地擴展其符號世界模型，同時神經適應階段保持其推理引擎與新知識的一致性。我們在 \texttt{Retro Quest} 模擬環境中提出了一個評估協議，以探測組合泛化場景來評估我們的 AGEL 代理。我們的研究結果明確表明，我們的 AGEL 模型在性能上優於純 LLM 基礎模型。我們的框架為構建對其世界有明確、可解釋和組合結構理解的代理提供了一條原則性途徑。
2604.26522.author: Mahnoor Shahid et.al.
